TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Lalauya Itiniay i Alishan Cen no Chiayi ko Lalauya a niyaro', 378 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,165 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 68% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 787 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 32% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 378 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Cou 56%, Bunun 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɾaɾao~u~uja itiniaj i aɾisħan ʦən no~u ʦħiaji ko~u ɾaɾao~u~uja a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʦo~uo~u~u **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Lalauya Itiniay i Alishan Cen no Chiayi ko Lalauya a niyaro', 378 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,165 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 68% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 787 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 32% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 378 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Cou 56%, Bunun 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɾaɾao~u~uja itiniaj i aɾisħan ʦən no~u ʦħiaji ko~u ɾaɾao~u~uja a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʦo~uo~u~u **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
